title: Payment Controls and Approvals
description:
Did you know that organizations lose an average of 5% of their revenue annually due to fraud, with payment fraud being one of the most common schemes? This Short Course was created to help accounting professionals accomplish systematic verification of financial controls and authorization processes.

By completing this course, you'll be able to confidently explain the business rationale behind dual authorization systems, systematically verify transaction approvals using standardized checklists, and create clear documentation that supports internal control compliance. These skills will transform your ability to safeguard organizational assets and ensure regulatory adherence in your daily accounting operations.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Understand the rationale for dual authorization controls on high-value transactions
Apply a checklist to confirm proper approval on financial documents

This course is unique because it combines foundational control theory with hands-on verification practice, using real-world scenarios that mirror actual accounting department workflows and compliance requirements.

To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic accounting principles and familiarity with financial document processing.
